content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the new controller runtime tests against the controller and reconciliation implementations, including tests/unit/controller_runtime_test.rs, tests/unit.rs, src/contexts/milestone_record/controller.rs, src/cli/run.rs, and src/contexts/automation_runtime/failure_reconciliation.rs. I did not find change-specific correctness, safety, or robustness issues in the diff. Verification: targeted cargo test controller_runtime_test -- --nocapture and cargo fmt --check passed. Repo-wide cargo clippy --tests -- -D warnings is still red on unrelated existing code at tests/unit/process_backend_test.rs:2872, and nix build did not complete during this review pass.

## Amendments

None.
